title: rhamnus frangula f. angustifolia
intro: Rhamnus frangula f. angustifolia, also known as narrow-leaved buckthorn or dwarf alder buckthorn, is a subspecies of the Rhamnus frangula plant, belonging to the family Rhamnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anthraquinone glycosides that stimulate bowel movements and have laxative effects. The health benefits of Rhamnus frangula f. angustifolia include relief from constipation, reduction of inflammation, and potential treatment of liver and gallbladder issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
